installCommand: (cd apps/dashboard && npm ci) && (cd apps/budget && npm ci) && (cd apps/list && npm ci)
buildCommand: (cd apps/dashboard && npm run build) && (cd apps/budget && npm run build) && (cd apps/list && npm run build) && mkdir -p dist/budget dist/list && cp -r apps/dashboard/dist/dashboard/browser/. dist/ && cp -r apps/budget/dist/budget/browser/. dist/budget/ && cp -r apps/list/dist/list/browser/. dist/list/
